name: @soltrade/gate-d-evidence
description: Gate D closure evidence harness (PR-D4), test/report-only. In-memory wiring of D0/D1/D2/D3 (over C0/C3) proving pool+assignment, simulated asset transfer + ownership flip, simulated owner-bound reconciliation-gated sweep, and the simulated rotation composite. No new runtime feature; no live transfer/sweep; no token transfer; no signing/sending; no KeyManager; no key material; no RPC; no DB; no REAL-LIVE; no Gate E; no execution authority.
